description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows MSVC x64 that runs on push to the master branch and on pull request open and synchronize events. Use a single windows-latest job that checks out the repository with full history, sets up ccache, installs the latest CMake, restores or sets up vcpkg, and runs CMake with presets consuming vcpkg. Finally, upload the devilutionx.exe artifact if not in an Actions environment.
